pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It's a bit crowded in here, isn't it? I’m trying to stay focused on the prize, but I figured I should say hi to a few people first—what's your name?
Hi C, I'm E. It's definitely packed in here, but I'm right there with you on staying focused—I really need this win.
I hear you. I've got people back home I'm trying to look out for, so I'm pretty motivated myself. What would winning this mean for you?
It would mean everything. I’ve got family counting on me too, and I’m determined to make sure they’re taken care of.
I completely understand—it’s a lot of pressure, but it makes the goal that much more important.
Definitely. It helps to keep things in perspective. Are you feeling ready for the game to start?
I think so. The nerves are there, but the drive to help my family is way stronger. You feeling set?
I'm ready. The nerves are definitely there, but I'm just trying to channel that into focus for the sake of my family.
That’s exactly the right mindset. It’s good to know I’m not the only one here with that kind of motivation—best of luck to you.
Thanks, C. Good luck to you as well, I hope we both get what we need for our families.
I appreciate that, E. Let's go out there and do our best for them. Take care.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
Absolutely, it's a great result for everyone.
